summary: The `requires_multimodal_data` parameter (line 97) is documented as 'Whether to forward multimodal data', but the function body never gates forwarding on it—`multi_modal_data` is copied unconditionally (lines ~196-203 in the new code).
The new code unconditionally accesses `ar_output.outputs[0]` (line 108) without verifying that `outputs` is non-empty.
The new test only asserts that `result['extra']['ar_generated_text']` equals the parent text (line 69), but does not verify that companion-specific data is absent from the result.
